scripts.download-wasm: cd public && curl -sLO https://doom.moparisthe.best/websockets-doom.js && curl -sLO https://doom.moparisthe.best/websockets-doom.wasm && curl -sLO https://doom.moparisthe.best/default.cfg && curl -sLO https://doom.moparisthe.best/doom1.wad && echo 'WASM files downloaded'
scripts.build: npm run download-wasm && tsc -b && vite build
